---
title: "Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    scrolling: true
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("DT")
library(DT)

projects <- tibble::tibble(
  project = c(
    "Portfolio Website",
    "Repositioned Airbnb",
    "Export DAP fertilizer to SE Asia",
    "Functional Programming assignment"
  ),
  type = c(
    "Project",
    "Project",
    "Project",
    "Assignment"
  ),
  status = c(
    "Completed",
    "Completed",
    "Completed",
    "Completed"
  ),
  category = c(
    "Market Analysis & Control",
    "Consumer Behavior",
    "International Logistics",
    "Market Analysis & Control"
  ),
  progress = c(100, 100, 100, 100),
  hours = c(12, 5, 7, 9)
)

total_projects <- nrow(projects)
completed_projects <- sum(projects$status == "Completed")
in_progress <- sum(projects$status == "In Progress")
average_progress <- round(mean(projects$progress))
```

## Row

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Projects & Assignments"
list(
  icon = "folder",
  color = "primary",
  value = total_projects
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Completed"
list(
  icon = "check-circle",
  color = "success",
  value = completed_projects
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "In Progress"
list(
  icon = "clock",
  color = "warning",
  value = in_progress
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Average Progress"
list(
  icon = "bar-chart",
  color = "info",
  value = paste0(average_progress, "%")
)
```

## Row {height="45%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Project & Assignment Progress"

ggplot(projects, aes(x = reorder(project, progress), y = progress, fill = status)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Progress (%)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Completed" = "#22c55e",
      "In Progress" = "#f97316"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#| title: "Time Spent by Project & Assignment"

ggplot(projects, aes(x = reorder(project, hours), y = hours, fill = category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Hours",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Market Analysis & Control" = "#2563eb",
      "Consumer Behavior" = "#7c3aed",
      "International Logistics" = "#14b8a6"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

## Row {height="45%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Project and Assignment Table"

datatable(
  projects,
  options = list(
    pageLength = 3,
    searching = TRUE,
    lengthChange = FALSE
  ),
  rownames = FALSE
)
```

::: {.card title="Recent Updates"}

### Latest portfolio work

- Added a separate dashboard page  
- Organized projects by status and progress  
- Created visual summaries using R  
- Added a searchable project table  
- Next step: turn in  

:::
